commands.review_summary:
The PR disables embedded pi-coding-agent SDK auto-retry in prepared Pi runtime settings, updates the focused prepared-settings test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes at source level: current main leaves Pi SDK retry enabled, the pinned SDK retries by removing the failed assistant message and calling continue(), and OpenClaw has an outer retry loop. I did not establish a live Feishu/Qwen replay in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer action remains: add after-fix real behavior proof and clear or explain the failing checks before normal maintainer review; this is not a safe automation repair lane because automation cannot supply the contributor’s runtime proof.
